File: C:\Users\athar\Downloads\quote-genie-main\quote-genie-main\QUICK_START.md (306 lines) 1: # Backend Integration - Installation & Usage Quick Start 2: 3: ## Installation Steps 4: 5: ### 1. Install Dependencies 6: Run this in the project root: 7: ```bash 8: npm install 9: ``` 10: 11: This will install: 12: - **Frontend**: React, Vite, Shadcn UI components 13: - **Backend**: Express.js, PostgreSQL client, JWT, CORS, and more 14: 15: ### 2. Setup Environment 16: Create `.env.local` in the root directory (already created, just update): 17: 18: ```env 19: # Backend Configuration 20: PORT=3001 21: FRONTEND_URL=http://localhost:8080 22: 23: # JWT Secret (change this in production!) 24: JWT_SECRET=your-super-secret-key-change-this 25: 26: # PostgreSQL Database 27: DB_HOST=localhost 28: DB_PORT=5432 29: DB_USER=postgres 30: DB_PASSWORD=password 31: DB_NAME=quote_genie 32: 33: NODE_ENV=development 34: ``` 35: 36: ### 3. Setup PostgreSQL Database 37: 38: **Option A: Using psql (Windows/Mac/Linux)** 39: ```bash 40: # Connect to PostgreSQL 41: psql -U postgres 42: 43: # Create database 44: CREATE DATABASE quote_genie; 45: 46: # Verify (you should see quote_genie in the list) 47: \l 48: 49: # Exit 50: \q 51: ``` 52: 53: **Option B: Using pgAdmin GUI** 54: - Open PgAdmin 55: - Right-click "Databases" → Create → Database 56: - Name: `quote_genie` 57: 58: ### 4. Run Everything 59: 60: **Option 1: Run Both Frontend + Backend Together** 61: ```bash 62: npm run dev:full 63: ``` 64: 65: **Option 2: Run in Separate Terminals** 66: 67: Terminal 1 (Frontend): 68: ```bash 69: npm run dev 70: # Runs on http://localhost:8080 71: ``` 72: 73: Terminal 2 (Backend): 74: ```bash 75: npm run dev:backend 76: # Runs on http://localhost:3001 77: ``` 78: 79: ## Verify Setup 80: 81: ### Check Backend is Running 82: ```bash 83: curl http://localhost:3001/api/health 84: ``` 85: 86: Expected response: 87: ```json 88: { 89: "status": "OK", 90: "timestamp": "2026-03-24T10:00:00.000Z", 91: "uptime": 2.345 92: } 93: ``` 94: 95: ### Test Login 96: ```bash 97: curl -X POST http://localhost:3001/api/auth/login \ 98: -H "Content-Type: application/json" \ 99: -d '{"email":"user@example.com","password":"password123"}' 100: ``` 101: 102: ## Using the API in React Components 103: 104: ### Example 1: Login Component 105: ```typescript 106: import { apiClient } from '@/lib/api'; 107: import { useState } from 'react'; 108: 109: export function LoginForm() { 110: const [email, setEmail] = useState(''); 111: const [password, setPassword] = useState(''); 112: 113: const handleLogin = async () => { 114: try { 115: const response = await apiClient.login(email, password); 116: console.log('Logged in:', response.user); 117: // Token automatically saved to localStorage 118: } catch (error) { 119: console.error('Login failed:', error); 120: } 121: }; 122: 123: return ( 124:
125: setEmail(e.target.value)} 128: placeholder="Email" 129: /> 130: setPassword(e.target.value)} 133: type="password" 134: placeholder="Password" 135: /> 136: 137:
138: ); 139: } 140: ``` 141: 142: ### Example 2: Quotation List 143: ```typescript 144: import { apiClient } from '@/lib/api'; 145: import { useEffect, useState } from 'react'; 146: 147: export function QuotationList() { 148: const [quotations, setQuotations] = useState([]); 149: const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true); 150: 151: useEffect(() => { 152: const fetchQuotations = async () => { 153: try { 154: const response = await apiClient.getQuotations(); 155: setQuotations(response.quotations || []); 156: } catch (error) { 157: console.error('Failed to fetch quotations:', error); 158: } finally { 159: setLoading(false); 160: } 161: }; 162: 163: fetchQuotations(); 164: }, []); 165: 166: if (loading) return

Folder Structure 206: 207: ``` 208: quote-genie-main/ 209: ├── src/ 210: │ ├── BACKEND/ ← Backend server 211: │ │ ├── server.ts ← Express server entry 212: │ │ ├── routes/ ← API endpoints 213: │ │ │ ├── auth.ts 214: │ │ │ ├── quotation.ts 215: │ │ │ ├── proposal.ts 216: │ │ │ ├── file.ts 217: │ │ │ └── health.ts 218: │ │ ├── middleware/ ← Custom middleware 219: │ │ │ └── auth.ts ← JWT verification 220: │ │ ├── config/ ← Configuration 221: │ │ │ └── database.ts 222: │ │ ├── .env.example 223: │ │ └── README.md 224: │ ├── lib/ 225: │ │ ├── api.ts ← Frontend API client ⭐ USE THIS 226: │ │ ├── auth.ts 227: │ │ └── utils.ts 228: │ ├── components/ ← React components 229: │ ├── pages/ ← Pages 230: │ └── main.tsx 231: ├── .env.local ← Environment variables 232: ├── package.json ← Dependencies & scripts 233: ├── BACKEND_SETUP.md ← Setup guide 234: └── vite.config.ts 235: ``` 236: 237: ## Available Scripts 238: 239: ```bash 240: # Frontend 241: npm run dev # Run frontend only (port 8080) 242: 243: # Backend 244: npm run dev:backend # Run backend only (port 3001) 245: npm run build:backend # Build backend for production 246: 247: # Both Together 248: npm run dev:full # Run frontend + backend together 249: 250: # Other 251: npm run build # Build frontend for production 252: npm run lint # Check code style 253: npm test # Run tests 254: ``` 255: 256: ## Common Issues 257: 258: ### ❌ "Cannot find module 'express'" 259: ```bash 260: npm install 261: ``` 262: 263: ### ❌ "Port 3001 already in use" 264: Change PORT in `.env.local` or kill the process: 265: ```bash 266: # Mac/Linux 267: lsof -i :3001 | grep LISTEN | awk '{print $2}' | xargs kill -9 268: 269: # Windows 270: netstat -ano | findstr :3001 271: taskkill /PID /F 272: ``` 273: 274: ### ❌ "PostgreSQL connection refused" 275: - Ensure PostgreSQL is running (check Services on Windows) 276: - Verify credentials in `.env.local` 277: - Check database exists: `psql -U postgres -l` 278: 279: ### ❌ "CORS error when frontend calls backend" 280: - Ensure backend is running on port 3001 281: - Check `FRONTEND_URL` in `.env.local` matches frontend URL 282: - Make sure token is sent in request headers 283: 284: ## Next Steps 285: 286: Once basic setup is complete: 287: 288: 1. ✅ **Database Schema**: Create tables for users, quotations, proposals 289: 2. ✅ **Password Hashing**: Use `bcrypt` instead of plain text 290: 3. ✅ **File Upload**: Implement file storage (local or cloud) 291: 4. ✅ **Validation**: Add input validation with `zod` 292: 5. ✅ **AI Integration**: Connect to OpenAI or Anthropic APIs 293: 6. ✅ **Real Data**: Connect all routes to PostgreSQL queries 294: 7. ✅ **Testing**: Write unit and integration tests 295: 8. ✅ **Deployment**: Deploy to production (Heroku, Vercel, etc.) 296: 297: ## Support 298: 299: - Check [BACKEND_SETUP.md](./BACKEND_SETUP.md) for more details 300: - Check [src/BACKEND/README.md](./src/BACKEND/README.md) for API documentation 301: - Review example components in `src/components/` 302: 303: --- 304: 305: **Happy Coding! 🚀** 306:
